title: Auto Mace Swap
description: A client-side combat mod that instantly ghost-swaps to a Mace mid-attack for massive damage and fast cooldowns.
body:
⚔️ Mace Swap (Advanced Combat Utility)
Mace Swap is a powerful client-side combat utility mod for Fabric designed to maximize your PvP potential. It automates the infamous "Ghost Swap" trick, introduces smooth Target Assist, and enables frame-perfect shield-break, wind charge, trident, and elytra-mace divebomb combos!

✨ Features

Ghost Swapping: When you left-click to attack, the mod instantly switches to the Mace in your hotbar, lands the hit, and swaps back to your main weapon. Deal massive Mace damage while keeping the fast attack speed and visual handling of your Sword!

Target Assist: Never miss a hit. Press the toggle key while looking at an enemy to lock on. The camera will smoothly track the target. Features advanced Line of Sight checks, Smart Priority, and customizable distance limits.

Elytra & Trident Divebombs: Take to the skies and decimate enemies!

Elytra Combo: With a single hotkey, the mod equips your Elytra, boosts you with a Firework, tracks your target, and re-equips your chestplate right before impact.

Trident Combo: Lock onto a target and right-click with a Riptide Trident. The mod automatically launches you upward, dives precisely at the target, and swaps to your Mace.

Wind Burst Chaining: Both combos fully support the Wind Burst enchantment for infinite, automated mid-air strike loops!

Spear Fast Swap (1.21.11+): Perform 0-tick spear dashes! Instantly ghost-swap to a Spear to dash or attack when left-clicking with an empty hand or non-weapon item.

Auto Shield Break & Penetration: Automatically punish shield users. Hit a blocking player with an Axe to break their shield and instantly swap to your Mace. Alternatively, use Shield Penetration to micro-teleport behind them and bypass the block entirely.

Advanced Auto Wind Charge: Falling from a height or right-clicking will automatically throw a Wind Charge directly below you and jump. This uses silent packet manipulation, meaning your camera will not visually flick down! Can be configured to work always or only during Target Lock.

Auto-MLG & Refill: Automatically saves you from lethal fall damage using water or wind charges, and automatically refills your hotbar with essential items from your inventory.

Smart Contextual Controls: Everything revolves around intuitive keybinds (Default: R for Target Assist/Swap, V for Elytra Launch, G for Axe Combo).

Fully Configurable: Fully customizable through ModMenu (requires Cloth Config API). Adjust your attack delays, aim speeds, targeting distances, item filters, and toggle specific modules.

⚙️ How to Use

Place a Mace (and Wind Charges/Fireworks/Elytra/Trident, if using those features) anywhere in your hotbar or inventory.

Hold your primary fast weapon (e.g., a Sword or Axe).

Standard Swap: Press R while looking away from entities to enable standard Auto-Mace mode. Attack your target to trigger the instant swap.

Target Assist & Combos: Look directly at an enemy within your configured distance and press R to lock on. The camera will track them, attacks will automatically swap to the Mace, and Wind Charges will seamlessly deploy.

Elytra Divebomb: Press V while looking at an enemy. The mod will launch you up, track the target, and prepare a lethal strike.

Trident Divebomb: Lock onto an enemy (R) and hold Right-Click with a Riptide Trident.

Shield Break: Toggle the Axe Combo mode with G. Hit a blocking enemy with your Axe, and let the mod do the rest!

⚠️ Disclaimer
This mod utilizes rapid inventory slot switching and silent rotation/position packets to perform its mechanics. While it works perfectly on vanilla servers, strict server-side anti-cheats may flag these instant inventory updates, spoofed rotations, or smooth aim assistance. Use responsibly and at your own risk on public multiplayer servers!
